summary: Frontend-only verification of header logo size increase from 70px to 85px (+21%). All 11 checks passed across desktop (1920), tablet (768), and mobile (390) viewports.
passed: Desktop logo renders at exactly 85px height (measured 85.0, width 212.78)
VFX header logo displays at 85px with correct src (ripplelogohovfx)
Digital header logo displays at 85px after department switch (ripplelogohodigital)
Aspect ratio maintained via w-auto (2.503 identical across viewports)
Logo does not overlap menu button (logo_right=428.78, menu_left=1649.59)
Mobile 390px: logo fits within viewport at 85px (right edge=236.78)
No hover: classes present on logo img element (class='h-[85px] w-auto')
Department switcher functional (VFX <-> Digital swaps logo src)
Logo anchor clickable and navigates to #hero
Class attribute confirmed as 'h-[85px] w-auto' on live DOM
